benefits.description: Lost ~17 lbs in first month, 27 lbs total in 2 months (207 to 180 lbs). Described as basically effortless.
Had to almost force themselves to eat due to limited appetite; didn't mind eating less.

side_effects.description: Shifted into ketosis rapidly; urine burning if not drinking plenty of fluids and electrolytes.

protocol_notes: Prior experience with fasting, keto, IFF, Paleo, and extreme calorie restriction. Recommends doubling or tripling water intake with electrolyte supplementation. Warns about getting into serious trouble without diligence about eating.
